examples: One elderly man sat morosely at the bar.
George stared morosely at the water.
"I'm commutin four hours a day, " he said morosely.
But for European leaders, this downbeat reaction is part of a pattern: they often react morosely to success.
Martin Starr is a morosely unattractive Russian-lit major who complains about everything in the lugubrious drone of a campus coffee-shop wit.
